avoid.market: Will the Fed cut rates 0 times?
avoid.reason: Implied 80% aligns with sticky CPI ~3.3% and modest GDP; no independent edge or specific source beyond market consensus

avoid.market: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027?
avoid.reason: Complementary to zero-cut market at ~23%; no divergence or catalyst for 8%+ macro edge

avoid.market: Will the WTI crude oil settlement price be above 77.99 USD/Bbl on Jul 17, 2026?
avoid.reason: Same-day settlement; no current spot/futures quote or inventory data available for grounding, cannot establish edge

avoid.market: Will there be a recession in 2027?
avoid.reason: 40% implied is reasonable for two-quarter GDP rule into 2027 given mixed growth signals; insufficient edge and no proprietary recession model

notes: High-volume markets limited to Fed policy, same-day WTI, and 2027 recession. CPI ladder prices sticky inflation near 3.3% YoY for July, Q2 GDP ladder implies ~1.5-2% growth, Fed holds (low cut odds). No same-day commodity/weather grounding data, no fabricated sources, and no macro edges meeting 8% threshold after filtering spreads >0.10 and volume <50k. Zero high-conviction opportunities.
